reasoning: Order is marked Complete but shows Total Paid $0.00 and Total Due $192.76 with Check/Money Order payment. This indicates the order was never paid, yet completed, and no shipment confirmation or delivery proof is visible. Customer claims non-receipt. This is a system/process inconsistency requiring finance/fulfillment investigation before refunding. Escalation needed to verify shipment status and why order completed without payment.
